metadata.title: SpyCloud - Disable Account
metadata.description: Immediately disables Entra ID user accounts confirmed as compromised by SpyCloud infostealer data. Performs account disable, session revocation, and OAuth permission audit. Use for high-severity incidents where immediate containment is required. Accounts must be manually re-enabled after investigation.
prerequisites: Managed Identity requires User.ReadWrite.All and Directory.ReadWrite.All permissions
Approval workflow recommended before automated disable for non-critical accounts
postDeployment: Grant the Logic App managed identity User.ReadWrite.All and Directory.ReadWrite.All
Configure incident tag 'RequiresReEnablement' watchlist for tracking
Set up notification for disabled accounts requiring re-enablement
